title: In vitro synthesis of PE2 (nCas9-MMLV RT fusion) polyA mRNA using T7 RNA polymerase

steps: Preparation of linearized plasmid DNA encoding the PE2 protein for use as a template for in vitro transcription by T7 RNA polymerase.
Synthesis of mRNA by T7 RNA polymerase, using a 5’ cap nucleotide to initiate the mRNA and using E. coli poly A polymerase to add a synthetic poly A tail after transcription.
Column purification of the final synthetic, capped and polyadenylated mRNA.
Digest 100 µg plasmid with 200 units Pme I restriction endonuclease in a 1 mL reaction using CutSmart buffer for 04:00:00 . at 37 °C .
Purify the cleaved DNA by phenol-chloroform extraction, collect the upper (aqueous) phase and transfer to fresh 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes.
Add 5 Molarity (M) NaCl to a final concentration of 0.1 Molarity (M) ( 20 µL ) and 3 volumes of 100% ethanol.
Leave at -80 °C for 02:00:00 to Overnight to precipitate.
Spin 16000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Remove the ethanol and air dry for 00:30:00 .
Resuspend at 500 μg/ml in TE ( 10 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl, pH 7.5 , 1 millimolar (mM) EDTA) buffer. Store the DNA sample at -20 °C .

In order get a high yield of the 6500nt long PE2 mRNA by T7 RNA polymerase transcription, set up 8 x 20 µL in vitro transcription reactions using 1 µg of cleaved template DNA in each reaction and the New England Biolabs HiScribe T7 ARCA kit with tailing (E2060S), according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
Incubate at 37 °C for 02:00:00 in an incubator (not a temp block).
For each 20 µL reaction, add 2 µL DNase I (stock is 2 U/uL ).
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:15:00 .
Dilute the reaction to 50 µL with 20 µL RNase-free water, 5 µL 10X polyA polymerase buffer and 5 µL E. coli polyA polymerase.
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 .
Purify the polyadenylated mRNA on 50 µg New England Biolabs Monarch RNA cleanup columns (2 of 20 µL reactions per column) (T2040L).
Dilute each 20 µL reaction with 100 µL binding buffer and 150 µL 100% ethanol.
Add the two diluted reactions to one column and spin at 16000 x g, °C, 1 minute .
Wash each column with wash buffer and spin twice (see below).
Elute in 25 µL of RNase-free H 2 O per column, incubate for 00:01:00 at Room temperature .
Spin at 16000 x g, °C, 1 minute into fresh 1.5 mL tubes and pool elution together into one tube.
Measure the RNA concentration using a Nanodrop1000c spectrophotometer. The yield from the total of 8 reactions is usually ~ 200 µg .
Store the mRNA at -80 °C and avoid repeated freezing and thawing.
Wash with 500 µL wash buffer (spin at 16000 x g, °C, 1 minute ). (1/2)
Wash with 500 µL wash buffer (spin at 16000 x g, °C, 1 minute ). (2/2)
creator: Ezgi Booth
